1	import type { PageLoad } from './$types'
2	import { createClient } from '$lib/gql/client'
3	import { gql } from 'graphql-request'
4	
5	export const PROJECT_RUNS_QUERY = gql`
6		query ProjectRuns(
7			$projectID: ID!
8			$first: Int
9			$after: String
10			$layer: RunLayer
11			$status: String
12			$harness: String
13		) {
14			runs(
15				projectID: $projectID
16				first: $first
17				after: $after
18				layer: $layer
19				status: $status
20				harness: $harness
21			) {
22				edges {
23					node {
24						id
25						layer
26						status
27						projectID
28						beadId
29						startedAt
30						durationMs
31						harness
32						queueInputs
33					}
34					cursor
35				}
36				pageInfo {
37					hasNextPage
38					endCursor
39				}
40				totalCount
41			}
42		}
43	`
44	
45	export interface RunNode {
46		id: string
47		layer: string
48		status: string
49		projectID: string | null
50		beadId: string | null
51		startedAt: string | null
52		durationMs: number | null
53		harness: string | null
54		queueInputs: string | null
55	}
56	
57	export interface RunEdge {
58		node: RunNode
59		cursor: string
60	}
61	
62	export interface PageInfo {
63		hasNextPage: boolean
64		endCursor: string | null
65	}
66	
67	export interface RunConnection {
68		edges: RunEdge[]
69		pageInfo: PageInfo
70		totalCount: number
71	}
72	
73	interface QueryResult {
74		runs: RunConnection
75	}
76	
77	export const PAGE_SIZE = 50
78	
79	export const load: PageLoad = async ({ params, url, fetch }) => {
80		const layer = url.searchParams.get('layer') ?? null
81		const status = url.searchParams.get('status') ?? null
82		const harness = url.searchParams.get('harness') ?? null
83	
84		const client = createClient(fetch as unknown as typeof globalThis.fetch)
85		const data = await client.request<QueryResult>(PROJECT_RUNS_QUERY, {
86			projectID: params.projectId,
87			first: PAGE_SIZE,
88			layer: layer ?? undefined,
89			status: status ?? undefined,
90			harness: harness ?? undefined
91		})
92	
93		return {
94			nodeId: params.nodeId,
95			projectId: params.projectId,
96			runs: data.runs,
97			activeLayer: layer,
98			activeStatus: status,
99			activeHarness: harness
100		}
101	}

<script lang="ts">

input.new_string:
<script lang="ts">
	import { page } from '$app/stores';
	import { goto } from '$app/navigation';
	import { onMount } from 'svelte';
	import { createClient } from '$lib/gql/client';
	import { gql } from 'graphql-request';
	import FilterChip from '$lib/components/FilterChip.svelte';

	const AGENT_METRICS_QUERY = gql`
		query AgentMetricsByProvider($window: AgentMetricsWindow!) {
			agentMetrics(window: $window, groupBy: PROVIDER) {
				window
				groupBy
				revision
				rows {
					key
					attempts
					successes
					successRate
					meanDurationMs
					p50DurationMs
					p95DurationMs
					meanCostUsd
					effectiveCostPerSuccessUsd
					meanInputTokens
					meanOutputTokens
					lastSeenAt
				}
			}
		}
	`;

	interface AgentMetricsRow {
		key: string;
		attempts: number;
		successes: number;
		successRate: number;
		meanDurationMs: number;
		p50DurationMs: number;
		p95DurationMs: number;
		meanCostUsd: number;
		effectiveCostPerSuccessUsd: number | null;
		meanInputTokens: number;
		meanOutputTokens: number;
		lastSeenAt: string | null;
	}

	type SectionKey = 'availability' | 'performance';
	type WindowKey = 'W24H' | 'W7D' | 'W30D';
	const WINDOW_LABEL: Record<WindowKey, string> = { W24H: '24h', W7D: '7d', W30D: '30d' };

input.command:
git add cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\[nodeId\]/providers/+page.svelte cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/\[nodeId\]/providers/agent-endpoints.e2e.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(web): Availability/Performance section toggle on /providers [ddx-4deb0a8e]

Adds a Performance section to the Agent availability page driven by the
agentMetrics(window, groupBy: PROVIDER) resolver. Section selection and
window flow through the URL using the Story 8 chip query-param schema
(?section=, ?window=), and provider-axis rows drill into
/nodes/[nodeId]/providers/[name]?window=<24h|7d|30d>.

data.text:
Commit landed. Summary:

- Added an Availability/Performance section toggle to `/nodes/[nodeId]/providers` (`cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/providers/+page.svelte`).
- Performance fetches `agentMetrics(window, groupBy: PROVIDER)` and renders attempts / success rate / p50 / p95 / mean cost / cost-per-success.
- Section + window selection driven via the Story 8 chip query-param schema (`?section=performance&window=W24H|W30D`).
- Provider-axis row links go to `/nodes/[nodeId]/providers/[name]?window=24h|7d|30d`.
- Added an e2e test covering the toggle, table, drill-through href, and window-chip URL behavior; existing two providers tests still pass; svelte-check 0 errors; `go build ./...` clean.
